Safal Pegasus: a relevant Vitan reference for your flexible workspace portfolio

Hi Raj,

The Address already has a premium brand signal in Ahmedabad. The design question is usually not "more interiors" but how to keep first impression and execution clarity consistent as centers evolve.

I’m sharing Safal Pegasus as a reference for how we approach premium frontage and business confidence. A flagship commercial project often used to demonstrate polished business environments and urban presence.

Project Snapshot
Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat
Type: Commercial
Why it fits: Strong relevance for The Address's flexible workspace direction.
